content.en:
Eternal Night Pavilion.

When Ye Tian came to this branch, the Lord of Yuanji was very excited.

"Lord of Dong Yuan, is this still the time to buy those material resources? This time, another batch of goods has arrived. The Lord of the Yuan Pole said.

Ye Tian hurriedly shook his head, "Lord of Yuanji, I didn't buy those materials this time, but changed a batch of materials. "

Subsequently, he said what he needed.

These materials were the ones he used to build the Origin Rule weapons, so they were of a higher grade and more valuable.

When the Lord of Yuan Ji heard the materials that Ye Tian needed, he was immediately a little surprised.

"Lord of Dong Yuan, almost all of the materials you need are used to build legendary Origin Rule weapons, could it be that you want to build Origin Rule Weapons?"

"No, it should be your master who wants to help you build the Origin Rule weapon, but it seems to be a little too early!"

The Lord of the Yuan Pole was surprised.

Origin rule weapons are indeed very powerful, but if you don't master the origin rules, you won't be able to exert the power of origin rule weapons!

"Lord of Yuanji, you can say whether to sell it or not, if you are willing to sell, I will still use the high-grade eternal ancient gold in exchange. "

When Ye Tian mentioned exchanging it for high-grade eternal ancient gold, the Lord of Yuanji was immediately overjoyed and hurriedly agreed.

Although those materials are very precious, they are not as rare as the finest Eternal Ancient Gold!

So, this kind of deal must be done!

Soon.

Ye Tian used some high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold to buy some materials for refining Origin Rule weapons, and then left the Eternal Night Pavilion.

Subsequently.

He handed over the materials to the real body replica body.

......

"Next, start building the Origin Rule Weapon, with so many materials, there should be hope to successfully create an Origin Rule Weapon!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After all, the difficulty of crafting an Origin Rule weapon is about the same as the difficulty of crafting a high-level Divine Weapon on the other side, at most it is a little more difficult.

And after all, he has the experience of building high-level divine soldiers on the other side, and the success rate will definitely be higher now.

Next.

As soon as he copied his body, he went all out to create an Origin Rule weapon.

He built a spear.

Airplanes!!!!

Ye Tian used a trace of origin rules to integrate into a variety of materials, and then built them according to the way of building a high-level god soldier on the other side.

But.

The first time he built it, he still failed and wasted a lot of materials.

But he didn't care, and then continued to build.

Build again and again, fail again and again.

But on the eleventh time, he was lucky enough to succeed in building it.

Rumble!!!!

The Origin Rule Weapon Spear exudes the weapon of the Origin Rules of the Land of Eternity, and with a light poke, it directly pierces the time and space of the Land of Eternity.

Subsequently.

He took the spear and tried to attack, and sure enough, the power skyrocketed.

"Very good, this Origin Rule weapon has improved my strength a lot. "

Ye Tian put away this Origin Rule weapon.

Ruins on the other side.

Ye Tian's copy body was still in that special void to comprehend the origin fragment.

Since he had comprehended the rules of the Origin himself, this Origin Fragment was not complicated for him.

He continued to learn more and more about the rules of the Origin.

However, the fragment itself contained very limited origins, so it was impossible for him to comprehend too many things.

this day.

This fragment of the Origin was about to shatter completely.

Ye Tian wanted to stop it, but he couldn't stop it.

Click!

The Origin Fragment had completely dissolved into nothingness, and the void was about to shatter.

Wow!

Ye Tian rushed out from here.

Subsequently, his replica body also searched for the best eternal ancient gold in the ruins on the other side.

For him, he naturally wouldn't have too much of such a good thing as high-grade eternal ancient gold!

......

The pinnacle of the Bloody Fang.

Not too far from here, in an area of the Eternal Shore, a whirlpool suddenly appeared.

Gradually, the whirlpool grew larger and larger.

And in the whirlpool, there is also a phantom of the world.

Whew!!!

A Nine-Stage Bone Transformation Realm from the top of the Blood Tooth came here to investigate the situation here.

"This is the birth of a new world!"

A nine-time bone transformation realm spoke.

It was common for the Eternal Lands to give birth to new worlds, so they weren't too surprised.

However, as time passed, the personality aura of this world became more and more terrifying.

It took a long time for the personality of this world to stabilize.

"The personality aura of this world has reached the eighth level!"

The Bone Transformation Realm at the top of the Blood Fang was shocked.

The eighth-level personal world, this is very high, it belongs to a very rare kind of personal world, and the newly born eighth-level personal world, the resources that are bred inside it are also very precious, maybe it will give birth to good things.

So, they immediately notified the leader of the Top of the Blood Fangs, the Lord of the Blood Fangs!

The Lord of the Blood Fang is the only one at the top of the Blood Fang's Origin Realm, and his strength is quite good.

Click!

The Lord of the Blood Fangs tore through the void and descended, staring at the nascent world, and then began to deduce.

"This world is very extraordinary, you all block the news for me and don't allow it to be leaked. No Heavenly Ancestor was allowed to approach here, even the Heavenly Ancestor of Gu Heng Mountain, they were not allowed to approach. The Lord of the Blood Fang commanded.

"Yes!"

A group of bone transformation realms responded.

In this way, as the years passed, this new eighth-level personal world slowly grew and was conceived.

At most, a thousand primeval eras, and this world will be completely born.

In the beginning.

Gu Heng Mountain really didn't know the situation in this world, but the top of the Blood Tooth controlled this place so strictly, which naturally attracted Gu Heng Mountain's attention.

In addition, there was already hatred between Gu Heng Mountain and the top of the Blood Fang, so Gu Heng Mountain's bone transformation realm secretly sneaked here and explored the real situation.

......

Guheng Mountain.

Several Deputy Mountain Masters were discussing the matter of that eighth-level personal world.

"There is an eighth-level personality world born near the top of the Blood Fang, which seems to be extraordinary, what do you think?"

"The top of the blood fangs is nothing, but behind the top of the blood teeth is the Ice Beast Palace of the Ice Pole Domain, and the strength of the Ice Beast Palace is no less than ours. If it's for the sake of an eighth-level world, is it worth going to war with the Ice Beast Palace?"

"That eighth-level world hasn't been completely conceived yet, so we can't know the value of that world. "

"When that world is born, we will deduce its value and then decide whether to snatch it or not. "

"Well, then wait slowly, once the value is huge, then you're welcome. "

"Then it's decided!"

Subsequently.

They just waited.

Finally, on this day, that eighth-level personal world was completely conceived.
